data.name: Principal Group Engineering Manager
data.jobDescription:
Overview

As the world adopts AI transformation, we provide enterprises with advanced cyber security applications and services. Modern cyber security requires innovative approaches and continuous adaptation and learning.  

Our products incorporate recent developments in AI and ML for cyber security. The Microsoft Defender suite is a key product line developed by our team, which includes Microsoft Defender Antivirus (AV) and Advanced Threat Protection (ATP) solutions. Mobile endpoints are more prevalent due to ease of access, and they pose a threat vector for the enterprise data. We are focused on delivering highly performant experiences that are simple for mobile users through our products. These products and services play a foundational role in Microsoft 365 and represent a significant growth area for Microsoft.  

We focus on delivering reliable and user-friendly products to customers. Our team consists of individuals from diverse backgrounds and experiences, and we aim to further develop this diversity. The team values ongoing learning, collaboration with other groups, and prioritising customer needs while developing cyber security products.  

Individuals interested in contributing to accessible cyber security solutions that reach users globally are encouraged to consider joining our team. 

 



Responsibilities

As Group Engineering Manager, you will lead and develop a diverse team focused on delivering exceptional user experiences and protection for Mobile endpoints. You will collaborate with Engineering Managers to build a sustainable organisation, ensuring product experiences and services are scalable, reliable, and optimised. Your role includes providing strong leadership, fostering collaboration and trust, maintaining a data-driven culture, and advancing Microsoft 365 Security adoption. Success in this position requires comfort with start-up environments, a drive for long-term architecture, and motivation to solve complex security challenges.



Qualifications

  • More than 15 years of experience as a software engineer on large-scale commercial projects. 

  • Experience in mentoring and developing talent. 

  • Communication skills and collaboration with multi-disciplinary teams including Software Engineers, Program Managers, Security Researchers, and Data Scientists. 

  • Over 4 years of experience designing end user applications on mobile platform (iOS and/or Android) 

  • Over 4 years of experience building an entire app from scratch and ideally a portfolio of apps featured in the App Store. 

  • Over 4 years of experience in development principles and patterns 

  • Over 4 years of Swift and Objective-C with iOS internals and/or Java/JNI and Android internals 

  • Skills in debugging and problem-solving. 

  • Knowledge of secure software development life cycle. 

  • Familiarity with software development tools such as source control systems (GIT), automated build systems, compilers, software validation systems, project tracking, and lifecycle management systems. 

  • Ability to work independently and manage technical and architectural dependencies. 

  • Holds a BS or MS degree in Computer Science. 

Microsoft is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran status, race, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws, regulations and ordinances.  

Benefits/perks listed below may vary depending on the nature of your employment with Microsoft and the country where you work. 


This position will be open for a minimum of 5 days, with applications accepted on an ongoing basis until the position is filled.



Microsoft is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, citizenship, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, immigration status, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran or military status, race, ethnicity, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable local laws, regulations and ordinances. If you need assistance with religious accommodations and/or a reasonable accommodation due to a disability during the application process, read more about requesting accommodations.

blogs.title: Microsoft Sovereign Cloud adds governance, productivity and support for large AI models securely ru
blogs.description: As digital sovereignty becomes a strategic requirement, organizations are rethinking how they deploy critical infrastructure and AI capabilities under tighter regulatory expectations and higher risk conditions. Microsoft’s approach to sovereignty is grounded in enabling enterprises, public sectors and regulated industries to participate in the digital economy securely, independently and on their own terms. The Microsoft Sovereign Cloud brings together productivity, security and cloud workloads to span both... The post  Microsoft Sovereign Cloud adds governance, productivity and support for large AI models securely running even when completely disconnected   appeared first on  The Official Microsoft Blog .

blogs.description: Today, we’re proud to introduce Maia 200, a breakthrough inference accelerator engineered to dramatically improve the economics of AI token generation. Maia 200 is an AI inference powerhouse: an accelerator built on TSMC’s 3nm process with native FP8/FP4 tensor cores, a redesigned memory system with 216GB HBM3e at 7 TB/s and 272MB of on-chip SRAM, plus...
